description:
Build a cognitive assessment battery that combines three classic attention paradigms into a single PsychoPy Builder experiment. The experiment flow must include a welcome screen, task-specific instruction screens, trial loops for each task, inter-block breaks, and a final debrief screen. The task blocks must appear in the order: Stroop, Flanker, then Simon.

Stroop Task: Use conditions file /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/stroop_conditions.csv. Response mapping: left=red, down=green, right=blue.
Flanker Task: Use conditions file /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/flanker_conditions.csv. Responses: left or right arrow keys.
Simon Task: Use conditions file /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/
